---
title: "Summary Stats/Visualizations"
author: "North Carpenter"
date: "2026-05-26"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)

library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
```


```{r, include=FALSE}
# Importing Data
crash2023 <- <- read.csv("../566 Project Data/FARS2023NationalCSV/vision.csv")
```
